taskContract.objective: Rebuild the Angular application around a low-friction prompt-protection flow that stays client-side, masks sensitive strings by default, and exposes review controls without leaking the original prompt.

layer.name: core.masking
layer.responsibility: Detect sensitive patterns, normalize overlaps, generate masks, rebuild output, and support regeneration without UI dependencies.

constraints.item: Pure helpers and validators live in utils folders.

layer.name: core.state
layer.responsibility: Own source text, async scan state, group preferences, protected results, and session persistence.

constraints.item: State transitions must expose user-readable status text.
Copy safety must be derived from masked output availability.

layer.name: features.scanner.ui
layer.responsibility: Present the fixed workflow: input, suspense scan, protected output, group controls, per-match controls, and help.

constraints.item: The result is rendered in an output element.
Help content is accessible through question-mark triggers.

qualityBars.item: Client-side processing must be explicit in the UI.
Regex coverage must prioritize EN-US, PT-BR, and ES-LatAm.
Toasts and status snippets must explain scan and copy outcomes.
Repeated strings must be centralized to preserve DRY.
